complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1) Extract egui painter paths from circuit_view renderer, 2) Convert painter commands to SVG path elements with proper transformations, 3) Implement A4 page scaling, viewport fitting, and file export functionality with crisp rendering validation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate complexity involving graphics path conversion and scaling math. Reuses existing renderer paths reducing implementation risk. Requires understanding egui painter API and SVG spec but follows clear pattern. Testing via browser verification is straightforward. Dependencies minimal.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Research cuStateVec Rust bindings feasibility and create decision matrix
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1) Analyze cuStateVec C API and Rust CUDA binding options (cust vs rustacuda), 2) Document Windows build requirements and CMake integration challenges, 3) Create performance comparison matrix vs pure Rust alternatives, 4) Build minimal proof-of-concept linking cuStateVec, 5) Produce decision report with risk assessment and recommendation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High research complexity due to multiple technical domains (NVIDIA CUDA ecosystem, Rust FFI, Windows build systems, quantum simulation performance). Requires deep investigation across platforms, dependency analysis, and creating comprehensive decision matrix. Proof-of-concept adds implementation risk.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1) Define core QuantumSimulator trait with all required methods and error handling, 2) Implement BackendSelector with runtime detection logic, 3) Create object-safe trait object support and blanket implementations, 4) Add integration tests with mock CPU/GPU backends and feature flag handling.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate-high design complexity for extensible trait architecture. Requires deep Rust trait system knowledge (object safety, lifetimes, generics). Backend selection logic adds runtime complexity. Strong test strategy reduces risk but multiple dependencies increase coordination needs.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Implement CUDA state vector kernels for quantum gate operations
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1) Write CUDA kernel for single-qubit gate application with coalesced memory access, 2) Implement controlled gate kernel (CNOT/CZ) with conditional execution, 3) Develop swap gate kernel for qubit reordering, 4) Create Rust-CUDA interop bindings using cust crate, 5) Add gate fusion optimization for adjacent gates, 6) Implement comprehensive unit/integration tests with CPU validation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Very high complexity combining CUDA kernel development, GPU memory optimization, Rust FFI, and quantum algorithm correctness. Gate fusion and 24GB state vector handling add significant performance engineering challenges. Multiple failure modes in GPU programming require extensive testing.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Add GPU memory management with VRAM tracking and circuit chunking
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1) Implement VRAM estimation and availability checking functions, 2) Develop circuit chunking algorithm for OOM scenarios, 3) Create chunked circuit execution with host-device transfers, 4) Build memory pool allocator for small buffer management, 5) Integrate with QuantumSimulator trait and add stress testing.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity due to sophisticated GPU memory management patterns, circuit analysis algorithms, and async host-device synchronization. Chunking requires deep understanding of quantum circuit structure. Memory pool implementation adds allocator complexity. Critical for production reliability.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Implement hybrid CPU/GPU scheduling with automatic backend selection
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1) Implement runtime backend selection logic based on qubit count and hardware detection, 2) Develop state vector serialization/deserialization between CPU/GPU, 3) Create UI integration with manual override and warnings, 4) Add comprehensive testing for transfer correctness and performance.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity integrating multiple systems (scheduler, trait system, UI, memory management). State vector transfer precision critical for correctness. UI coordination adds frontend complexity. Performance trade-offs require careful tuning and benchmarking.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Evaluate quantum kernel emulator approach post-v1.0
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1) Execute comprehensive benchmarks across CPU/GPU backends with standardized circuits, 2) Perform scalability analysis and VRAM validation testing, 3) Conduct competitive analysis against QCGPU-Rust and other simulators, 4) Create detailed evaluation report with optimization recommendations.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High analytical complexity requiring systematic benchmarking, competitive research, and architectural review. Multiple measurement dimensions (performance, scalability, extensibility). Report synthesis demands clear communication of technical trade-offs.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Reconsider simulation approach: quantum kernel emulator vs state vector
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1) Research existing quantum kernel emulator implementations and approaches, 2) Create prototype spike comparing state vector vs kernel emulator for Bell state, 3) Produce decision document with complexity/performance trade-offs and implementation roadmap.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Strategic decision complexity involving research, prototyping, and architectural evaluation. Requires understanding quantum simulation paradigms and educational value trade-offs. Prototype adds implementation risk but scoped to minimal viable comparison.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: 1) Implement pre-allocated reusable buffers to eliminate allocation overhead, 2) Add Rayon parallelization for subspace iteration, 3) Develop incremental simulation with dirty column tracking, 4) Implement gate fusion optimization for common patterns, 5) Add SIMD support via nalgebra and comprehensive performance profiling.
